Marketing Strategist · Pakistan
MuskanHaider
Brand Strategist. Content Creator. Growth Architect.

I'm Muskan Haider — a Marketing Strategist focused on building brands that don't just look aesthetic, but actually grow with purpose. I've worked across skincare, perfumes, and event brands, turning ideas into digital strategies that hit and connect.

I blend creativity with data — from scroll-stopping content and social media management to building brand identities that truly speak to the audience.

Starting my journey early shaped me to be adaptable, quick to learn, and always in sync with trends. I'm constantly experimenting, evolving, and leveling up strategies to make impact that lasts.

04 — Event Management

SK Events & Jaztas

End-to-End Event Strategy & Execution

From concept to execution, I've managed brand events under SK Events and Jaztas — combining digital presence with real-world experiences. Every event is treated as a brand-building moment that leaves a lasting impression.

My approach is rooted in storytelling: every detail, from the visual identity to the guest experience, is aligned with the brand's narrative and amplified through social media.

Event concept & theme development
Social media coverage & live content
Promotional graphics & invitations
Vendor & logistics coordination
Post-event content & recap reels
Digital promotion pre-event
